subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Your recent letter which you had sent was received, its contents bearing testimony to this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد نامه اخیر که ارسال نموده بودید وصول یافت مضامین دلیل بر آن بود
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
